summary: ANDROID | FALCON | DFU - After succesful DFU previous FW version is displayed on Home page and settings page
scenario: Home screen and Device Settings page show outdated firmware version after DFU until app restart
description_clean: After a successful DFU (Device Firmware Update), the Home screen and device settings page still display the previous firmware version instead of the updated version. The correct firmware version only appears after restarting the app.
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app and navigate to the Home screen.
2. Note the firmware version displayed for the connected device.
3. Perform a Device Firmware Update (DFU) for the connected Poly Bluetooth audio device.
4. Wait for the DFU to complete successfully.
5. Observe the firmware version displayed on the Home screen.
6. Navigate to Device Settings → [Device Name] and observe the firmware version displayed there.
7. Close and restart the Poly Studio Mobile app.
8. Navigate back to the Home screen and Device Settings → [Device Name] and observe the firmware version.
expected: After a successful DFU, the updated firmware version should immediately appear on the Home screen and in Device Settings without requiring an app restart.
actual: After a successful DFU, the Home screen and Device Settings page still display the previous firmware version. The correct (updated) firmware version only appears after restarting the app.
